properties.description: Orchestrates the 3 Direct Ingester notebooks (audit log, licensed users, org data) end-to-end and writes Delta tables for the Fabric PBIT to consume.

activities.name: Run_Audit_Log_Ingester
activities.description: Calls Microsoft Graph audit log API, polls until Purview is ready, fetches records, parses + flattens, writes Delta table dbo.copilot_interactions_parsed. Typical runtime 5-15 min (Purview polling dominates).

activities.name: Run_Licensed_Users_Ingester
activities.description: Calls Microsoft Graph M365 active user report, derives HasCopilot flag, writes Delta table dbo.copilot_licensed_users. Independent of audit log activity — runs in parallel. Typical runtime <30 sec.

activities.name: Run_Org_Data_Ingester
activities.description: Calls Microsoft Graph /users with manager expansion, writes Delta table dbo.copilot_org_data. Independent of audit log activity — runs in parallel. Typical runtime <30 sec.
